info.description: This is a sample JWT authentication service.

tags.name: local-email-outbox
tags.description: Helpers for inspecting the local JMS stub

post.summary: Exchange a valid OIDC ID token for an app JWT token pair

409.description: SSO identity conflicts with an existing local account

post.summary: Authenticate user and return JWT token
Refresh JWT token using refresh token
Complete password reset with a valid token
Logout user and revoke refresh token
Create a new order from cart

post.description: Streams responses and expects the caller to manage the entire conversation history client-side.

post.summary: Chat with Ollama using backend function calling (legacy stateless endpoint)
post.description:
Available tools: get_product_snapshot, list_products.
Use GET /api/v1/ollama/chat/tools/definitions for the full JSON schema.
This endpoint requires the caller to resend the full conversation on every request.
Small local models stay grounded only when they keep everything in the product lane—always snapshot a SKU first and follow up with list_products if it needs comparisons.

get.summary: Get recent email events for the current user
get.description: Returns the latest email events recorded for the authenticated user. Statuses reflect handoff to the Mailhog-backed test sink, not real-world inbox delivery.

get.summary: Get traffic log by correlation identifier

get.description: Returns information about WebSocket endpoints for traffic monitoring

get.summary: Fetch all queued emails produced in the local profile

delete.summary: Delete user account and all user-owned data

204.description: User account and user-owned data were deleted

toolSystemPrompt.description: Tool-specific system prompt for function calling

description.example: Latest iPhone model with A15 Bionic chip

idToken.description: OIDC ID token returned by the configured identity provider

token.description: Password reset token received via email

identifier.description: Username or email address associated with the account

resetBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the frontend reset page base URL. Must include scheme (http/https). When not provided the backend default is used.

token.description: Raw password reset token, returned only for local/testing profiles

text.description: Text to use in QR code

description.example: Latest iPhone model with A15 Bionic chip

model.description: Model to use, needs to be available on the Ollama server.

think.description: Should the model think before responding?

error.description: Missing model error. You need to pull it

model.description: Model to use. Must be available on the Ollama server. Clients can override it per request.

messages.description: Complete conversation history in chronological order.

example.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. You must use the conversation history to answer questions.
That's great! Python is a versatile and popular programming language. What do you enjoy most about Python programming?
What programming language did I say I love?

tools.description: Function/tool definitions available to the model.

think.description: Should the model think before responding?

type.description: Type of the tool. Only 'function' is supported currently.

function.description: Function metadata describing how Ollama should call the backend.

name.description: Function name exposed to the model

description.example: Return catalog metadata for a product

parameters.description: JSON schema describing the function arguments

properties.description: JSON schema properties describing the arguments.

required.description: List of required properties for this schema.

oneOf.description: Optional oneOf blocks to express alternative required sets.

required.description: Required keys under this oneOf branch.

template.description: Optional template identifier used by downstream consumers

properties.description: Template properties that help the consumer render the message

status.description: Delivery status recorded by the application for the Mailhog-backed test sink

createdAt.description: When the email event was first recorded

updatedAt.description: When the email event status was last updated

failureReason.description: Failure detail when the test mail sink handoff did not succeed

requestBodyTruncated.description: Whether the request body was truncated

requestBodyOriginalLength.description: Sanitized request body length before truncation

responseBodyTruncated.description: Whether the response body was truncated

responseBodyOriginalLength.description: Sanitized response body length before truncation

description.example: Connect to the WebSocket endpoint and subscribe to the topic to receive real-time HTTP traffic events
